jobDescription: Iterable is the growth marketing platform that enables brands to create, execute and optimize campaigns to power world-class customer engagement across email, push, SMS, in-app and more with unparalleled data flexibility. We are an integrated, cross-channel solution— Iterable is built for marketers, trusted by engineers, and designed with intelligence. We know this space well: our product team built the growth systems that powered Twitter’s early success. We've recently raised a $50 M Series C from top-tier investors like Index Ventures and CRV, and hundreds of companies like Zillow, Seat Geek, and Box rely on us to captivate their many millions of users. Iterable's momentum grows daily and there has never been a more exciting time to join the team! We've been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work for two years running, earned ourselves a top 20 spot among the Saa S 1000, and we host an annual growth marketing conference where innovative marketers around the world come to share ideas. We have a nation-wide presence with offices in San Francisco, New York, and Denver, plus we’re expanding internationally as we open an office in London. The Role As a member of Iterable’s Customer Success team, the Email Deliverability Consultant will be responsible for providing our customers with the necessary tools, strategies and best practices to ensure they’re happy and getting as much value as possible from the product. This is a key position for the company. We have had very few customer losses and we intend to keep it that way. Keeping customers happy and productive is core to our mission. Position Details: Provide email deliverability consulting services for new and existing customers of Iterable Educate customers on email marketing “best practices” while providing deliverability support Monitor customers’ performance using internal metrics and 3rd-party delivery tools Ensure customers have a smooth experience with our product and increasing their ROIPartner with Support to analyze tickets, discover trends and resolve any potential issues Ensure high level email campaign deliverability for a growing client base of enterprise companies Monitor client satisfaction to develop and implement strategies leading to retention and growth Gather delivery data into account assessments including Email Delivery Reports Warn customers for potential problems and provide strategies to manage reputation Discover and resolve email delivery problems with specific ISPs and mailbox providers Build strong relationships through MAAWG that will magnify our position as the industry leader Maintain a trusted advisor relationship with each assigned client The Ideal Candidate Will Be/ Have: Bachelor’s degree or equivalent experience3-5 years experience in email deliverability and/or growth marketing operations2+ years experience in a B2 B customer-facing role for a high-tech, Saa S organization Experience using 3rd-party delivery tools (250ok, Litmus, Return Path, Send Grid, etc.) High technical aptitude, motivated, goal-oriented and thrives in a fast-paced startup environment Proficient with ISP/domain-specific delivery policies, whitelisting and feedback loops with ISPs Expert with “best practices” for sending bulk email, list management and blacklist/spam reduction Strong familiarity with end-to-end email delivery ( IP addresses, DNS, SMTP, authentication, etc.) Knowledge of CAN- SPAM/anti-spam laws Excellent communication skills and a strong desire to work with customers Bonus Points: Previous experience with email marketing, push, or SMS software Perks & Benefits: Competitive salaries, meaningful equity, & 401(k) plan Medical, dental, vision, & life insurance Unlimited PTO, great work/life balance, and fantastic location Daily lunch stipend ( M- F) + unlimited snacks/beverages Generous monthly Employee Wellness Allowance  Professional Development Allowance of $300/quarter Pre-tax commuter benefits
